projectDescription: Senia is an AI-powered virtual receptionist for medical clinics that automatically handles patient conversations on WhatsApp, manages appointment scheduling, and integrates with leading clinic management systems — so your team can focus on care, not admin.
keyFeatures: Automated appointment scheduling, confirmation, and reminders
Human handoff with full conversation context
Integration with Feegow, Clinicorp, Gestão DS, App Health, Controle Odonto, Visual Asa, and any open-API system
Real-time dashboard with appointments and active conversation metrics
Customizable knowledge base (RAG) trained on your clinic's protocols
Automatic follow-up reminders for return appointments
Assisted onboarding with automated test battery before going live
publicApiSurface: ERP/clinic system integrations (Feegow, Clinicorp, Gestão DS, Controle Odonto, App Health, Visual Asa)
Open API integration for custom clinic systems
